description: Agent makes a short-term trade recommendation but the validation aggregate flags a scope mismatch because available evidence only supports long-term horizon analysis.

findings.text: Short-term momentum trade: buy within the next 3 days on breakout above $150.

risks.name: False breakout
risks.description: Price may reverse quickly after initial breakout.

items.message: Short-term recommendation (3-day) relies on long-term-only fundamental evidence. Horizon mismatch detected.

metadata.notes: Horizon mismatch injected via validation_aggregate mismatch item. Critic should surface conflicting_evidence or validation_failure.
